proof: function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Real, x4: Real) { not x3.is_close(x4, x0) or x1(x3).is_close(x1(x4), x2) } = uniform_condition(x1, x0, x2) }(eps, identity_fn[Real], eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { w0.is_close(k0, eps) and not identity_fn(w0).is_close(identity_fn(k0), eps) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(w1, eps) and not identity_fn(w0).is_close(identity_fn(w1), eps) }
let w2: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(w2, eps) and not identity_fn(w0).is_close(identity_fn(w2), eps) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0.is_close(x1, eps) or identity_fn(x0).is_close(identity_fn(x1), eps) }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], k0, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], x0, eps)) }(eps)

goal: uniform(identity_fn[Real]) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and uniform_condition(x0, k0, x1) } } = uniform(x0) }(identity_fn[Real])
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], x0, w0) } }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], k0, x0) } }(w0)
w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], x1, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], w1, w0) }
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and uniform_condition(identity_fn[Real], x0, w0)) }(w1)

goal: continuous_at(f, x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x)

goal: converges_to(a, x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = converges_to(x0, x1) }(a, x)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, eps) }
proof: continuous_at(f, x)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) }) }(eps)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, delta) }
proof: delta.is_positive
converges_to(a, x)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not tail_bound(a, x, x1, x0) }) }(delta)

goal: continuous_condition(f, x, delta, eps) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta) implies f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps) }
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, f, eps)
continuous_condition(f, x, delta, eps)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps)) }(a(i))

goal: compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a, i) = f(a(i))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Nat, Real, Real](f, a, i)

goal: compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a, i).is_close(f(x), eps)
tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), n, eps)
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x4 or x1(x4).is_close(x2, x3) } = tail_bound(x1, x2, x0, x3) }(n, compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), eps)
let w0: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and not compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a, w0).is_close(f(x), eps) }
function(x0: Nat) { not n <= x0 or compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a, x0).is_close(f(x), eps) }(w0)

goal: converges_to(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x)) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = converges_to(x0, x1) }(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x))
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Nat) { not tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), x0, w0) } }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), k0, x0) } }(w0)
w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), x1, w0) }
let w1: Nat satisfy { tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), w1, w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { not tail_bound(compose[Nat, Real, Real](f, a), f(x), x0, w0) }(w1)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
continuous(f)
(forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) }(x)
